name: Mr. Food's Chicken Kiev Roll-Ups- 10/27/95
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, combine dried parsley, chives, and garlic powder; set aside.
3. Pound chicken between two pieces of waxed paper to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
4. Sprinkle both sides of each breast lightly with salt and pepper.
5. Sprinkle one teaspoon of the parsley mixture on one side of each chicken piece.
6. Place a slice of butter in the center of each chicken piece.
7. Roll tightly, tucking in the sides as you roll.
8. Place the rolls seam side down in a medium-sized muffin tin coated with nonstick vegetable spray.
9. Sprinkle half a teaspoon of seasoned bread crumbs and some paprika over each roll.
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until no pink remains and juices run clear.
11. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 servings
